item.title: Version 1.1.3
item.description:
ParkShelf 1.1.3

  • Fixed keyboard parking for multi-window workflows. ⌥P now always parks the active window, so pressing it again parks the next window instead of restoring the previous one.
  • Added ⌥R to restore the last parked window. ⌥⇧R still restores all parked windows, and ⌥⇧P remains the Pro shortcut for Park All Open Windows.
  • Made custom shortcuts easier. Pro users can now record a shortcut directly in Settings instead of entering a hardware key code. Settings also explains the app-active fallback.
